title: Claudette Theme
description: A Claudette UI theme — manifest metadata plus grouped design tokens that map 1:1 to CSS custom properties on :root.

id.description: Unique theme identifier. kebab-case, lowercase, no spaces.

name.description: Human-readable theme name shown in settings.

scheme.description: Controls the native color-scheme CSS property. Affects form controls, scrollbars (some platforms), and which syntax highlighting theme loads.

description.description: Short tagline shown in the theme picker.

preview.description: Color swatches shown in the picker preview tile. Optional — the picker falls back to reading tokens directly.

tokens.description: Design tokens grouped for readability. Group names are organizational — at runtime the leaf key becomes the CSS variable name. Every known token and its default live in styles/theme.css.

sidebar-border.description: Sidebar trailing edge (rarely used with substrate-based depth).

panel-bg.description: Middle substrate layer — sidebar, right rail.

sunken-bg.description: Recessed wells — composer, code blocks, tool detail.

accent-primary-rgb.description: RGB triple for rgba() usage, e.g. "0, 229, 204".

canvas-atmosphere.description: Background gradient for the canvas. Use `none` to disable.

rim-light.description: `box-shadow` value (typically `inset 0 1px 0 <color>`) used as a 1px top-edge highlight on raised surfaces.

rim-light-strong.description: Stronger variant of `rim-light`. Also a full `box-shadow` value.

well-shadow.description: Inset shadow for sunken surfaces (composer, code blocks).

composer-ring.description: box-shadow applied to the chat composer at rest.

composer-ring-focus.description: box-shadow applied to the chat composer when focused.

typographyTokens.description: Typographic *scale* — sizes, weights, line-heights, letter-spacing. Font **families** are intentionally NOT themable (they're controlled by the app default + the user's Appearance settings) so every theme shares a consistent typographic voice.

font-size-base.description: Base UI size. Used by html/body font-size.

radius-pill.description: Full-pill radius (use a large value like 999px).

transition-instant.description: Motion-free tier — use `0s` for brutalist/snap themes.

transition-hover.description: Quick hover/press feedback. Defaults to `0.15s ease`.

transition-emphasis.description: Slow fade-in for attention reveals (shortcut badges, toolbar appear). Defaults to `0.5s ease`.

borderTokens.description: Border widths. Brutalist themes (Bunker) can push these up for chunky divisions; editorial themes keep hairlines.

border-thin.description: Default divider / card border width. Defaults to `1px`.

border-medium.description: Active-tab underline, emphasis edges. Defaults to `2px`.

border-thick.description: Strong accent edges on plan/question/attention cards. Defaults to `3px`.

iconTokens.description: Icon sizing scale. Adjust per theme for density (tight HUDs shrink, luxury themes grow).

icon-xs.description: Tiny indicators / inline dots. Defaults to `10px`.

icon-lg.description: Prominent icons (command items, avatars). Defaults to `18px`.

controlTokens.description: Heights for buttons, inputs, toggles. Drives the overall density feel.

control-height-sm.description: Compact controls (small chips, sliders). Defaults to `24px`.

control-height-md.description: Default button / toolbar row height. Defaults to `32px`.

control-height-lg.description: Prominent inputs, primary buttons. Defaults to `38px`.

componentTokens.description: Canonical padding pairs and dimensions for shared components (popovers, modals, menu items).

control-padding-x.description: Horizontal padding inside default controls. Defaults to `12px`.

control-padding-y.description: Vertical padding inside default controls. Defaults to `6px`.

chip-padding-x.description: Horizontal padding for chips/pills. Defaults to `6px`.

chip-padding-y.description: Vertical padding for chips/pills. Defaults to `2px`.

card-padding.description: Inner padding for cards, modal bodies. Defaults to `16px`.

menu-padding.description: Outer padding inside popover/menu containers. Defaults to `4px`.

menu-item-padding-x.description: Horizontal padding on menu rows. Defaults to `14px`.

menu-item-padding-y.description: Vertical padding on menu rows. Defaults to `8px`.

popover-width.description: Default popover width (fuzzy finder, command palette). Defaults to `520px`.

popover-max-height.description: Max height of a popover list. Defaults to `400px`.

modal-width.description: Default modal shell width. Defaults to `420px`.

zIndexTokens.description: Normalized z-index scale. Keep to this order: sticky < raised < dropdown < overlay < modal.

z-raised.description: Above peers (resize handles, scroll pills). Defaults to `10`.

shapeTokens.description: Raw-value tokens that let themes push STRUCTURAL treatments (not just colors) — user-message shape (bubble / prose / card), composer chrome, sidebar selection language (rail / block / card), role-label glyphs (dot / chevron / pill), panel chrome. Components consume via `var(--token, <current>)`; defaults preserve the built-in theme exactly.

user-msg-padding.description: Padding applied to user-role messages. Default `8px 14px 8px 16px`.

user-msg-chrome.description: box-shadow composite on user messages — the at-rest chrome/border. Default is a 2px accent rail: `inset 2px 0 0 rgba(accent, 0.35)`. Themes can swap for a full `inset 0 0 0 1px <color>, 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)` card treatment, a bubble, etc.

user-msg-bg.description: Background of user messages. Default `transparent`. Set a tint for bubble/card treatments.

user-msg-margin-top.description: Margin-top on user turns (after the first). Default `24px` to match `--turn-gap`.

composer-chrome.description: box-shadow applied to the composer slab at rest. Defaults to `var(--composer-ring)`; override to swap the at-rest treatment (slab vs line vs card) without touching the base ring.

composer-chrome-focus.description: box-shadow applied to the composer slab on focus-within. Defaults to `var(--composer-ring-focus)`.

sidebar-item-bg.description: Background of sidebar workspace rows at rest. Default `transparent`.

sidebar-item-chrome.description: box-shadow composite on sidebar items at rest — border/chrome treatment. Default `none`. Card-style themes can paint a per-item border here.

sidebar-selected-chrome.description: Additional box-shadow chrome applied only when a sidebar item is selected. Default `none` (the built-in uses an accent rail drawn via ::before). Themes can push a heavy ring or card shadow here for bolder selection.

sidebar-selected-bg.description: Background of the selected sidebar item. Defaults to `var(--selected-bg)`.

chat-header-padding.description: Padding of the chat panel header. Default `12px 22px`.

chat-header-chrome.description: box-shadow applied below the chat header. Default `none` (the built-in theme lets the header dissolve into the canvas). Slab themes can drop a divider / shadow here.

role-label-glyph.description: Raw CSS `content` value for the role-label ::before. Default `""` (an empty string so the existing tiny dot treatment wins). Themes can set `'›'`, `'▌'`, `'//'`, etc. to swap glyph language.

role-label-glyph-color.description: Color of the role-label glyph. Defaults to `var(--accent-primary)`.

role-label-weight.description: Font-weight of the role label. Default `600`.

role-label-transform.description: text-transform of the role label. Default `uppercase`. Set `none` for sentence-case themes.

panel-header-chrome.description: box-shadow below panel headers (sidebar section, repo header, etc.). Default `none`. Slab/brutalist themes can drop a hairline or shadow here.

app-bg-gradient.description: Optional additional canvas-level gradient layered ON TOP of `--app-bg`. Default `none`. Distinct from `--canvas-atmosphere` (which lives behind the chat messages) — this one sits on the outer window shell, letting themes add an extra depth layer without having to restate the atmosphere.

layoutTokens.description: Layout-adjacent tokens. Note: sidebar/panel widths are user preferences (persisted per user) rather than theme tokens — they are NOT exposed here.

chat-max-width.description: Max width of the chat messages column. Use `none` for full-bleed (the built-in default) or a length like `820px` for a centered reading column.

turn-gap.description: Vertical breathing room between consecutive chat turns. Applied as margin-top on each user turn after the first.

message-text-max-width.description: Max width applied to individual message bodies. `none` lets messages fill the canvas; set a length for a tighter reading measure.

composer-padding-y.description: Vertical padding inside the chat composer textarea.

composer-min-height.description: Minimum height of the composer input area.

sidebar-item-padding-y.description: Vertical padding of each workspace row in the sidebar — controls sidebar density.

sidebar-item-gap.description: Vertical gap between sibling repo groups in the sidebar list.

canvas-padding-inline.description: Horizontal padding on the chat canvas (both sides of the messages column).
